subject: Your team is waiting for a guide
previewText: A simple framework: schedule, launch, collaborate, implement.
module-3-0-0: A 30-minute rhythm that helps
module-4-0-0:
Hi {{ personalization_token('contact.firstname', 'fellow educator') }},

 

If you have ever wished for an easier way to share what works, you are not alone.

 

Teachers who stick with new practices long enough to see results often have one thing in common. They learn with a small group of peers.

 

That is what a Classroom Collaborative is designed to create.

 

Get your Collaborative Kit

Sign up to host, and we will send you everything you need to launch and sustain a successful Classroom Collaborative:

  • Comprehensive Host Guide
  • Article explaining the month's instructional focus
  • Monthly webinar to collaborate with other hosts
  • Slide template to use with your team
  • Monthly challenge to give your teachers
  • One-pager to distribute to your team

If you want, reply with your grade level and who you want to invite. We can suggest a simple first agenda.

 

- The SchoolAI team
